title: Smoky Greek Chicken Skewers
description: Light, garlicky chicken skewers with a smoky kick and a sweet blackberry jam glaze, perfect for a quick Whole30-friendly Mediterranean meal.

ingredients.name: skewers
ingredients.notes: soaked in water 30 min before use

instructions: In a bowl, whisk together olive oil, minced garlic, lemon juice, smoked paprika, liquid smoke, oregano, and salt to make the marinara.
Add the chicken cubes to the bowl, ensuring each piece is coated well. Cover and marinate in the refrigerator for at least 15 minutes.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat. While the grill heats, soak bamboo skewers in water for 30 minutes to prevent burning.
Thread the marinated chicken onto the soaked skewers, leaving a small gap between each cube.
Place the skewers on the grill and cook for 4–5 minutes on each side, or until the chicken is cooked through and has a nice char.
During the last minute of grilling, brush each skewer with blackcurrant jam, allowing it to caramelize slightly.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let them rest for 2 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with a sprinkle of fresh oregano or a wedge of lemon.
